overview: This image features a juvenile caiman resting on a giant Victoria amazonica water lily pad. The Victoria amazonica is the largest water lily in the world, with pads that can grow up to ten feet in diameter. Caimans are semiaquatic predatory reptiles found in the wetlands and floodplain lakes of Central and South America. These lily pads possess self-defense mechanisms, including prickles on their undersides. Nature Picture Library +5 6 sites Stock photo of Black caiman {Caiman niger} juvenile on Royal ...
